caption: The video showcases a vibrant and colorful display celebrating the Year of the Tiger in 2022. The scene is set at night, with an elaborate lantern festival featuring intricate and illuminated structures. A prominent pagoda-like tower stands tall on the right, adorned with bright lights and decorative elements, including a dragon motif. To the left, a large, ornate archway is decorated with various symbols and patterns, such as a crescent moon and a fish, all outlined in glowing lights. Silhouettes of people can be seen in the foreground, observing and taking photos of the dazzling spectacle. The overall atmosphere is festive and enchanting, capturing the essence of traditional Chinese celebrations.
